_comment: Every text string the website shows is controlled here. Add/remove sections by adding/removing their arrays.
title: सप्तसुर
subtitle: Tere Sur Aur Mere Geet
tagline: In Eternal Memory of Bharat Ratna Lata Mangeshkar
description: World Record Attempt:Performing 97 Lata Mangeshkar Songs Live Across Multiple Languages
countdownLabel: Time Until the Evening of a Lifetime
comingSoonDesc: Artists, setlist, and event details will be unveiled as the night approaches. Join us in honouring the voice that defined a generation.
quote: My voice is God's gift, and I have dedicated it entirely to music.

performers.desc: Bollywood's powerhouse voice, bringing fire and finesse.

performers.name: Shreya Ghoshal
performers.desc: Ethereal, classically trained — a natural torchbearer of Lataji's legacy.

performers.name: Mumbai Symphony Orchestra
performers.desc: 65 musicians, authentic period arrangements, full grandeur.
